results.rendered_html:
abhirūpa (abhi + rūpa)
1〉 adj. f. ā.
a〉 entsprechend, angemessen: āśuḥ śiśāno vṛṣabho na bhīma iti . aindryo 'bhirūpā dvādaśa bhavanti  ŚAT. BR. 9,2,3,6 . jātāya jātavatīm (ṛcam) abhirūpāmanubrūyāt  AIT. BR. 1,16 . 21 . kāmamanabhirūpamasyā vayaso valkalam  ŚĀK. 10,6 , v. l.
— b〉 schön  AK. 3,4,134 .  MED. p. 23 . viśvaṃ mṛśantīmabhirūpāṃ virājaṃ paśyanti tve na tve paśyantyenām  AV. 8,9,9 . utkṛṣṭāyābhirūpāya varāya sadṛśāya ca . — kanyāṃ dadyāt  M. 9,88 . abhirūpaguṇabhūyiṣṭhā pariṣat  ŚĀK. CH. 2,1 .  N. (BOPP) 12,30 .
— c〉 unterrichtet, gelehrt  AK. 3,4,134 .  H. 341 .  MED. p. 23 . kāmaṃ śrāddhe 'rcayenmitraṃ nābhirūpamapi tvarim  M. 3,144 . abhirūpabhūyiṣṭhā pariṣadiyam  ŚĀK. 3,11 .
— 2〉 m.
a〉 Mond.
— b〉 Śiva.
— c〉 Viṣṇu.
— d〉 Kāmadeva  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
abhirūpa a. [abhigato rūpaṃ]
1 Corresponding with, conformable or suitable to, congruous; abhirūpamasyā vayaso valkalaṃ  Ś. 1.  v. l.
2 Pleasing, delightful, handsome, charming, beautiful, well-formed; abhirūpeṇāpi svadārasaṃtuṣṭena  K. 51 ; utkṛṣṭāyābhirūpāya varāya sadṛśāya ca (kanyāṃ dadyāt)  Ms. 9. 88. 
3 Dear to, beloved or liked by, favourite; yo yaḥ pradeśaḥ sakhyā me'bhirūpaḥ  Ś. 6. 
4 Learned, wise, enlightened; abhirūpabhūyiṣṭhā pariṣadiyaṃ  Ś. 1 ;  K. 78 ;  Ms. 3. 144. 
— paḥ
1 The moon.
2 Śiva.
3 Viṣṇu.
4 Cupid,
Comp.
— patiḥ ‘having an agreeable husband,’ N. of a fast or rite performed to secure a good husband in the next world;  Mk. 1.
